missing_requirements.evidence_quote: After accessing the system, the user can perform various operations related to managing inventory and handling sales activities.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow the user to access the system using their credentials.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system also identifies expired goods and notifies about their removal from the inventory.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall notify the user when an item is identified as expired.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall generate an invoice for the order once it is placed.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement could be more specific about what information should be included in the invoice.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow the user to search for items available in the inventory and select them for purchase.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement does not specify how the search function works or what criteria can be used for searching.

prompt:
You are a strict requirements validator.
Compare rewritten requirements against the source text.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this schema:
{
  "missing_requirements": [
    {
      "evidence_quote": "string",
      "suggested_requirement": "The system shall ..."
    }
  ],
  "hallucinations": [
    {
      "rewritten_requirement": "string",
      "reason": "string"
    }
  ],
  "duplicates": [
    {
      "requirement_a": "string",
      "requirement_b": "string",
      "reason": "string"
    }
  ],
  "ambiguities": [
    {
      "rewritten_requirement": "string",
      "reason": "string"
    }
  ],
  "overall_assessment": "pass|needs_review"
}

Source text:
<<<
A user, such as an inventory manager or salesperson, accesses the system by signing in using their credentials. After accessing the system, the user can perform various operations related to managing inventory and handling sales activities.

The user can add new goods along with their details to the inventory, update the price of existing items, or remove goods that are no longer required. The system also identifies expired goods and notifies about their removal from the inventory.

When required, the user can place an order to a supplier for additional goods. Once the order is placed, an invoice is generated for that order.

For customer transactions, the user searches for items available in the inventory and selects them for purchase. Based on the selected items, the system calculates the applicable discount and tax. After that, a receipt is generated for the customer.

During the billing process, the user may replace an item or cancel the receipt if needed.

The system also records customer requests for items that may not be currently available.

At any point, the user can view a summary report that includes details of all transactions carried out in the system.

If required, the user can update their account password.
>>>

    "The system shall generate an invoice for the order once it is placed.",

    "The system shall calculate the applicable discount and tax based on the selected items.",
    "The system shall generate a receipt for the customer after the purchase.",
    "The system shall allow the user to replace an item or cancel the receipt during the billing process if needed.",
    "The system shall record customer requests for items that may not be currently available.",
    "The system shall allow the user to view a summary report of all transactions carried out in the system at any point.",
    "The system shall allow the user to update their account password."
  ]
}
final_assessment_policy: moderate: needs_review if extraction/rewriting failed, no rewritten requirements were produced, exact duplicate rewritten requirements were detected, or the LLM validator reports 6 or more total issues across missing requirements, hallucinations, duplicates, and ambiguities
